author: jsign
content: BTW, do you have some docs on how to run these EEST tests in the correct branch in your repo?

author: deme1744
content: Yeah, I had a look at that PR just now. Our implementation is a little different and does not allow for this 1-liner. However, it's not a huge amount of code change either for us so I think I'll add it too.

author: deme1744
content:
There is some documentation here https://github.com/status-im/nimbus-eth1/tree/master/execution_chain/stateless
But I need to update it a bit and add some more regarding the EEST tests. 

It's merged into our master branch, so you don't need any specific branch.
